arabic:
وعنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال‏:‏ ‏"‏إذا اقترب الزمان لم تكد رؤيا المؤمن تكذب، ورؤيا المؤمن جزء من ستة وأربعين جزءاً من النبوة‏"‏ ((مُتَّفَقٌ عَلَيهِ))‏.‏ ‏
‏وفى رواية‏:‏ ‏"‏أصدقكم رؤيا أصدقكم حديثاً‏"‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "When the time draws near (i.e., near the end of the world), the dream of a believer can hardly be false; and the dream of a believer represents one part from forty-six parts of Prophethood.".One narration says: Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) said, "The most truthful of you in their speech are those who see the truest visions."

chapter.english: The Book of the Etiquette of Sleeping, Lying and Sitting etc
